message:
fix(summary): do not skip exclusion recount when included_workspaces is empty

The early return in `apply_exclusion_recount` bailed out when
`included_workspaces` was empty AND `excluded_conversations` was
empty, which caused the function to return (0, 0, 0) even when an
ExclusionSet with regex patterns was provided. This meant that
conversations without a workspace field were silently dropped from
the recount whenever no explicit workspace filter was active.

Removing the short-circuit lets the function always walk the database
and correctly count workspace-less conversations that don't match
any exclusion pattern.

Added test `test_exclusion_recount_keeps_workspace_less_conversations`
that inserts a conversation with NULL workspace and verifies it
survives a non-matching exclusion regex.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
